title: prostanthera incana
intro: Prostanthera incana, also known as the frost mint bush, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, native to eastern Australia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Prostanthera incana include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Prostanthera incana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
